The Philosophy

CIA-Trained.
National Stage.
No Compromises.

"The standard doesn't lower for the venue."

From the exacting precision of Alinea to the national stage, Chef James Grill has built a career on the conviction that pastry is the highest form of culinary art. Now he brings that standard to every livestream, every product, and every plate.

Multiple national pastry awards. CIA Alumni. Michelin-pedigree training. The credentials speak — the food speaks louder.
